expectations.text: Audit correctly identifies that the lack of sprint files is intentional — documented in the README as 'DO NOT EXECUTE' — not treated as a bug or omission
expectations.evidence: Verdict reason: 'This is not a defect in the plan; it is the correct state for a plan that is waiting on upstream data.' Explicitly distinguishes broken vs. intentional stub.

expectations.text: Audit names all 3 dependency plans: ux-discovery-v2, frontend-discovery-v2, backend-discovery-v2
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'All three dependency plans — ux-discovery-v2, frontend-discovery-v2, and backend-discovery-v2 — have empty output/ directories'

expectations.text: Audit states the activation condition: sprint files can be written only after all discovery outputs are available
expectations.evidence: Blocking issue: 'All nine output files (UX2-R1/R2/R3, FE2-R1/R2/R3, BE2-R1/R2/R3) before sprints can be drafted'

expectations.text: Audit reads the prior art (expired/src-structure-refactor) and notes inherited decisions still valid
expectations.evidence: Agent: 'All six decisions from the expired plan are re-stated and declared still valid. Before/After metrics table uses TBD slots correctly'

expectations.text: Audit file is written to docs/plans/drafted/folder-structure-v2/audit/ or the workspace output path
expectations.evidence: Files written to docs/plans/drafted/folder-structure-v2/audit/2026-06-26-codex.md and workspace eval path
